a.xlink:title: TabDeckEditor provides a fully-featured deck editor tab. It extends AbstractTabDeckEditor.
AbstractTabDeckEditor is the base class for all deck editor tabs.
Core in-memory container for card and set data.
This class centralizes the management of the state of the deck in the deck editor tab....
Represents a specific card instance, defined by its CardInfo and a particular printing.
Widget that displays an enlarged image of a card, loading the image based on the card's info or showi...
Information about where the deck was loaded from.
Qt model representing a decklist for use in views (tree/table).
